title: MailerLite Review 2025: Features, Pricing & Honest Verdict
meta_description: Is MailerLite worth it in 2025? We break down pricing, features, pros and cons so you can decide.
h1: MailerLite Review 2025: Everything You Need to Know
intro: MailerLite is simple email marketing for small businesses that positions itself for small businesses and freelancers on a budget. Founded in 2010, it has become one of the most recognised platforms in the email marketing space. In this review we cover what it does well, where it falls short, and who should actually use it.
verdict: MailerLite is a solid choice for small businesses and freelancers on a budget. Its free tier is genuinely useful. The main trade-off is between its particular strengths and the limitations that make alternatives worth considering for some users.
pros: Good fit for small businesses and freelancers on a budget
cons: Can get expensive at higher subscriber counts
Some features locked to higher tiers
pricing_summary: MailerLite offers a free plan, with paid plans from $9/month. Pricing typically scales with subscriber count.
best_for_detail: MailerLite works best for small businesses and freelancers on a budget. If you fit that profile, the feature set aligns well. If you need something different, check the alternatives section.

faq.a: Yes, MailerLite has a free plan supporting up to 1000 subscribers. This makes it accessible for new senders testing the platform.

faq.q: What is MailerLite best used for?
faq.a: MailerLite is best for small businesses and freelancers on a budget. Its standout features include drag-drop editor, automation, landing pages, which suit this use case well.
MailerLite is generally beginner-friendly. The interface is straightforward for basic campaigns, though advanced automation features have a learning curve.

faq.q: Does MailerLite have an affiliate program?
faq.a: Yes, MailerLite runs an affiliate program paying 30% recurring. This is worth considering if you plan to recommend the platform to your audience.
